Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec trading_pipeline_entity_resolver python3 -c "import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect\(''/data/state.db''\); r=conn.execute\(''DELETE FROM processed_events WHERE stage=?'',\(''entity_resolver'',\)\); conn.commit\(\); print\(f''Deleted {r.rowcount} records''\); remaining=conn.execute\(''SELECT stage,COUNT\(*\) FROM processed_events GROUP BY stage''\).fetchall\(\); print\(''Remaining:'',remaining\); conn.close\(\)")
